title: Search Jolly
description: Find if jolly or bunts exists in the array. Return true for jolly, biceps for bunts, false otherwise.
constraints: ["1 <= arr.length <= 100", "Each string contains only lowercase letters"]
hints: ["Use a for loop", "Compare strings", "Return true for jolly", "Return biceps for bunts", "Check priority"]
starter_code: {"java": "import java.util.*;\\n\\npublic class Main {\\n    public static Object checkWords(String[] arr) {\\n        // Write your code here\\n        return false;\\n    }\\n\\n    public static void main(String[] args) {\\n        Scanner sc = new Scanner(System.in);\\n        String input = sc.nextLine().trim();\\n        String[] arr = input.split(\\\" \\\");\\n        Object result = checkWords(arr);\\n        System.out.println(result);\\n    }\\n}", "python": "def check_words(arr):\\n    # Write your code here\\n    return False\\n\\nif __name__ == '__main__':\\n    input_str = input().strip()\\n    arr = input_str.split()\\n    result = check_words(arr)\\n    print(result)", "javascript": "function checkWords(arr) {\\n    // Write your code here\\n    return false;\\n}\\n\\nconst readline = require('readline');\\nconst rl = readline.createInterface({\\n    input: process.stdin,\\n    output: process.stdout,\\n    terminal: false\\n});\\n\\nlet input = '';\\nrl.on('line', (line) => {\\n    input = line.trim();\\n    const arr = input.split(' ');\\n    const result = checkWords(arr);\\n    console.log(result);\\n    rl.close();\\n});"}
